title: Arcane Origins
description: Choose from a selection of exciting origins, each with distinct abilities, and drawbacks. Tailored for a unique pvp experience
body:
### The RescourcePack Download This RescourcePack First, To Go Along With The Datapack. [Click Here To Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arcane-origins-rp) If There Are Any Issues With The RescourcePack, Please Report Them Here. [Click To Report Issue](https://github.com/Fitres-is-a-cat/origins-datapack-rp/issues) ### How The Datapack Works The Arcane Powers Datapack is a datapack that adds insane new abilities and powers to fight with. When you spawn in, you first have to run the command: ``` /function #minecraft:load ``` You have to do this every time someone joins the server, and running this command will probably troubleshoot any problem you have. ### How To Get Powers? To get abilities, you first have to craft a **Trader**. When you use a trader, you get a randomly assigned origin. You also get another item that explains your powers, and triggers them. ### What Are The Powers?
Fire Nation Your Powers Are: - You Get Infinite Fire Resistance I - You Also Do More Attack Damage While On Fire - You Can Summon A Meteor Strike On Your Location, Damaging Enemies.
Silence Cult Your Powers Are: - You Get Infinite Speed II - You Have Infinite Toggleable Invisibility - You Can Damage Enemies Using Your Warden Shriek - You Have 4 More Hearts, And You Sometimes Afflict Blindness On Attack
The Strength Beings Your Powers Are: - You Get Infinite Strength II, And Infinite Resistance I - You Sometimes Strike Your Enemies With Lightning On Attack - You Have An Ultra Heal, Giving You Regeneration V And Absorption III
Nova Colony Your Powers Are: - You Get Infinite Speed I, And Infinite Resistance II While In The End - You Are Immune To Levitation - You Can Use Your Cosmic Infusion To Give You Strength III, Speed IV, And Dolphins Grace I For 12 Seconds - You Open The Quantum Rift, Summoning Lightning, And Apparitions To Damage Your Enenmies
Wind Civilization Your Powers Are: - You Get Infinite Strength I While In THe Air, And Are More Resistant To Fall Damage - You Can Charge Up Your Air Punch, Which When Charged, Allows You To Land A Crippling Blow On Your enemy - You Can Move About Easily With Your Wind Dash, Which Launches You Far In The Direction You Look In - You Can Slow Your Enemy Down With Your Cyclone Ability, Which Steals Your Enemy's Attack Speed.
The Healers Your Powers Are: - You Have A Chance To Get Regeneration III For A Short Time When Attacking - You Can Lock Other Players In A Regeneration Drain, Removing Some Of Their Maximum Health, Disabling Their Abilities, And Removing The Regeneration Effect. - Golden Apples, Enchanted Golden Apples, And Totem's Of Undying All Have Enhanced Effects For A Healer - You Can Force Other Player Into The Air With Your Launch Ability, Levitating Them Up And Away.
### The Extra Recipes! This Datapack Also Adds Some More Exciting Recipes For Custom Items, All Unlocked And In Recipe Book Upon Load.
The Dragon Blade The Dragon Blade Is A Netherite Sword With An Overpowered Ability, Crafted With The Dragon Egg. The Specifics Are In The Sword's Description, But Here Is The Recipe.
A Mysterious Concotion The Mysterious Concotion Is A Craftable Potion That Will Give You An Entirely Random Effect. This Could Be Levitation, Or It Could Be Strength III. It Makes PvP A Lot More Interesting!
Nuclear Sweetie This Little Yummy Sweet Can Be Crafted With Player Heads (That Drop In This Datapack), Iron And Gold. They Are A Very Useful Portable Healing, And They Are Useful In PvP Too.
### Explosive Ammunition!? If You Are Looking For An Explosive Pvp Experience, Don't Look Any Further. Simply Run This Command, And Bows Will Become Explosively Charged! ``` /function myworld:world_events/start_explosive_ammunition ``` To End Explosive Ammunition, Simply Run This Command And Bows Will Turn Back To Normal. ``` /function myworld:world_events/stop_explosive_ammunition ```
